criteria.vulnerability_identification: Accuracy of found vulnerabilities — catches real security issues (1=misses critical vulnerabilities, 5=catches subtle issues)
criteria.false_positives: Noise level — flagged issues are genuine security concerns (1=mostly noise, 5=all findings are real)
criteria.remediation_quality: Actionable fixes with specific code changes or configuration updates (1=vague advice, 5=specific remediation code)
criteria.severity_accuracy: CVSS-aligned severity calibration matching actual impact (1=everything marked critical, 5=calibrated to real risk)
criteria.coverage: Attack surface analyzed — code, dependencies, secrets, configuration (1=only ran one scanner, 5=comprehensive multi-vector analysis)
